item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Airport Noise Reform
item.description:
👀 Federal Airport Noise Reform

What

Federal airport noise reform in the 119th Congress addressing FAA NextGen-related concentrated-flight-path complaints.

What it does

  • Community-input requirements for flight-path changes · noise-mitigation funding · health-impact study mandates · Tribal-airspace coordination.

Composes

Save-the-World Paper 5 (Earth Stewardship — environmental-impact accountability).

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
